page_header.label: STEALTH PAYMENTS
page_header.title: A Unique Address for Every Payment
page_header.description: Break the link between your identity and your transactions. Share one meta-address publicly, receive payments through unlimited unique stealth addresses.

paragraphs: "On public blockchains, receiving a payment means revealing your wallet address — and with it, your entire transaction history."

Traditional crypto payments force you to choose: either share your wallet address and sacrifice privacy, or create multiple wallets and sacrifice convenience. ZKIRA's stealth payments eliminate this tradeoff.

With stealth addresses, you can post one meta-address publicly — on social media, your website, or anywhere else — while receiving every payment through a completely unique, unlinkable address generated cryptographically by the sender. For complete anonymity, stealth addresses are now enhanced with a shielded pool for zero-knowledge proven privacy.

items.title: Share
items.description: Post your meta-address publicly. Unlike a regular wallet address, this reveals nothing about your transactions or balances.

items.title: Derive
items.description: Sender creates a unique stealth address using ECDH cryptography. Your ephemeral key + their view key = shared secret.

items.title: Claim
items.description: Only you can detect and claim the funds using your spending key. Gas relayer sponsors the transaction, maintaining anonymity.

paragraphs: Stealth addresses use Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) key exchange, the same cryptographic primitive that secures your HTTPS connections. Here's the magic:

items: Recipient: Generates a meta-address from view key + spend key
Sender: Creates ephemeral key + derives shared secret with recipient's view key
Result: Unique stealth address = recipient spend key + hash(shared secret)

sections.title: TYPESCRIPT

paragraphs: While stealth addresses provide unlinkable payments, the shielded pool adds an additional layer of privacy through zero-knowledge proofs. When you deposit funds into the shielded pool, they become part of a larger anonymity set.

Fixed-denomination deposits (1 SOL, 10 SOL, 100 SOL, etc.) ensure that deposit amounts cannot be used to correlate transactions. Groth16 zero-knowledge proofs allow you to withdraw funds without revealing which specific deposit you're claiming.

sections.title: TYPESCRIPT WITH SHIELDED POOL

items.title: Unlinkable Payments
items.description: Every payment uses a unique address. No one can link multiple payments to the same recipient or analyze your payment patterns.

items.title: Public Meta-Address
items.description: Share one address everywhere — social media, websites, business cards. It reveals nothing about your actual balances or transactions.

items.title: Self-Custody
items.description: Your keys, your coins. ZKIRA never has access to your funds. All cryptographic operations happen client-side with your own wallet.

items.title: ZK-Proven Privacy
items.description: Shielded pool deposits use Groth16 zero-knowledge proofs to break all on-chain links. Even blockchain forensics firms like Arkham cannot trace the connection between deposits and withdrawals.

sections.title: Try Stealth Payments
sections.description: Experience the future of private payments. Generate your meta-address and start receiving payments through stealth addresses today.
